creator: trueos@norwegianrockcat.com
text:
As Austin mentioned, the fetch is fixed by port commit 0d5a698e4b4c31d7bdc94c11077109f74cdaceff

The module builds after this, but it fails to load because it still depends on linuxkpi_gplv2, which was removed from drm-515-kmod. But I guess a separate bug-report should be opened up for that.
